arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the event integration.

description.description: A brief description of the event integration.

event_filter.description: The filter used to determine which events are processed by the integration.

eventbridge_bus.description: The name of the EventBridge bus associated with the event integration.

id.description: The unique identifier for the event integration.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the event integration for categorization and management.
